title: Applications are open now
summary: Are you ready to take the next step in your academic journey?
body: Are you ready to take the next step in your academic journey? Applications are now open for most of the international degree programs at Eötvös Loránd University! Learn more about the programs: https://www.elte.hu/en/find-degree-program Check out the Admissions section of your chosen program for details on the admission process! If you still have questions, seek help from the program coordinator, whose e-mail address is available under the Contact section. All programs are taught in English, no Hungarian is required. Start your journey at ELTE and join a vibrant international community.
